profile.title: Profile settings
profile.description: Manage artist details, biography, and external links.

profileForm.profileImageHint: Profile image is optional. You can save profile and continue artist activity without it.
profileForm.bioPlaceholder: Write a short introduction about yourself.
profileForm.historyHint: Use line breaks to separate entries.
profileForm.genericError: An error occurred while saving. Please try again shortly.

artworks.missingImageWarning: Please upload an image to display this artwork on the online purchase page.
artworks.partialSyncWarning: Some sales info is still being synchronized.
artworks.delayedSyncWarning: Online purchase info sync is delayed. Please check again shortly.
artworks.pendingAuthWarning: Online purchase info sync is delayed.
artworks.title: Artwork management

artworkList.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this artwork? You can restore it from admin activity logs.
artworkList.emptyDescription: Add a new artwork to complete your portfolio.

artworkForm.subtitle: Enter detailed information for this artwork.
artworkForm.title: Title
artworkForm.priceHint: Enter numbers only or text including ₩
artworkForm.artistNotePlaceholder: Describe the intention or artist note for this artwork.
artworkForm.genericError: An error occurred while saving. Please try again shortly.

suspended.title: Account Suspended
suspended.description: Your account has been restricted due to policy violations or an administrator decision.
suspended.contactSupport: Please contact the admin team if you need assistance.

pending.title: Pending Approval
pending.awaitingApproval: You can start artist activities after admin approval.
pending.readyToUse: You will be able to use the service once approval is complete.

onboarding.chooseDescription: Select the type that matches how you want to participate.
onboarding.applyArtistDescription: Artist directly consigning own artworks for exhibition and sales
onboarding.applyExhibitorDescription: Gallery/curator representing affiliated artists and managing submissions
onboarding.artistRecoveryDescription: Existing artist application data is missing and must be recovered. After saving, you will be redirected to the artist dashboard.
onboarding.artistOnboardingDescription: Submit minimum information for approval. Dashboard access remains restricted until approval.

onboardingForm.readToBottom: Please scroll to the bottom of the document.
onboardingForm.contractFull: Full exhibition and sales consignment agreement
onboardingForm.scrollHint: Consent options become active after you scroll to the bottom.
onboardingForm.agreeAll: I agree to the consignment agreement, terms of service, and privacy policy.
onboardingForm.allReadGuide: You have read all documents. Check the box to agree.
onboardingForm.needScrollGuide: Please scroll through all documents above to continue.
onboardingForm.incompleteDescription: Complete the items below to submit.
onboardingForm.genericSubmitError: An error occurred while submitting. Please try again shortly.
